name: tuturuuu
description: Codex operating guidance, validation, CI, and focused workflows for the Tuturuuu platform monorepo.

interface.shortDescription: Work in the Tuturuuu platform repo with local conventions.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skills for safe Tuturuuu platform development, including repo-wide workflow rules, Flutter mobile task-board guidance, Supabase database patterns, CI/docs maintenance, and plugin validation.
defaultPrompt: Use $tuturuuu-platform to implement a platform change.
Use $tuturuuu-mobile-task-board to fix a task-board issue.
Use $tuturuuu-database to plan a Supabase change.
Use $tuturuuu-ci-docs to update CI and docs.
